form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming from last on the turn second last of 9 at this track Ctry Bm58 on January 25 over 1183m, 3.5 len behind La Cache A Vin with 58.5kg at $12. Second-up didn't finish the race at Beaudesert 0 - 60 March 12 over 1650m. Capable on best but hard to consider here on two poor runs back from a break.

In great order and looks to have genuine winning prospects.
